Customer.notes: Long-term customer, very satisfied with enterprise plan. Referred 3 clients.
Raised billing concerns in last two calls. Competitor evaluation in progress.
Interested in upgrading to Premium. Usage growing steadily.
Support ticket backlog frustrating the team. Needs escalation review.
Top 10 account. Champions the product internally. Ready for case study.
Trial expires in 3 weeks. Has not scheduled onboarding call yet.
Recently switched from competitor. Learning the platform.
Critical: Angry about SLA breach last month. Threatened legal action.
Consistent usage. Interested in API integrations.
High-potential enterprise prospect. Decision maker engaged.

Interaction.subject: Quarterly business review
Interaction.content: Discussed product roadmap and expansion plans. Customer very happy with current results. Expressed interest in adding 5 more seats.

Interaction.subject: Billing dispute - overcharge on invoice #4521
Interaction.content: Customer claims invoice #4521 has an incorrect line item of $800. They are reviewing competitor pricing and mentioned Salesforce is offering a 20% discount.

Interaction.subject: Follow-up on billing concern
Interaction.content: Called to resolve billing issue. Customer still frustrated. Mentioned they are 'seriously considering alternatives'. Escalated to Customer Success Director.

Interaction.subject: Upgrade inquiry - Premium plan features
Interaction.content: Customer asked about Premium plan benefits. Particularly interested in advanced analytics and dedicated support. Team usage has grown from 5 to 18 users.

Interaction.subject: Integration error with ERP system
Interaction.content: API integration failing with their SAP instance. Error: 401 Unauthorized on webhook endpoint. Third ticket on this issue in 2 months. Team is frustrated.

Interaction.subject: NPS survey follow-up
Interaction.content: Customer scored 10/10 on NPS. Willing to participate in case study. Has referred two prospects already. Very strong advocate for the platform.

Interaction.subject: Trial onboarding reminder
Interaction.content: Sent onboarding resources. No response yet. Trial account shows minimal usage - only 2 logins in 10 days. Risk of trial expiring without conversion.

Interaction.subject: Welcome and onboarding check-in
Interaction.content: 30-day check-in. Customer getting familiar with the platform. A few questions about data import. Positive tone overall.

Interaction.subject: Formal complaint - SLA breach
Interaction.content: Customer submitted formal written complaint about the 4-hour outage on May 12. They experienced $50,000 in operational losses. Demanding SLA credit and compensation. CC'd their legal team.

Interaction.subject: Emergency escalation call
Interaction.content: Crisis call with VP of Operations. Very hostile. Demanded immediate executive call. Threatened to terminate contract and pursue damages. Requires VP-level intervention within 24 hours.

Interaction.subject: API documentation question
Interaction.content: Asked about webhook configuration for their internal pipeline. Resolved quickly. Customer satisfied with the response time.

Interaction.subject: Initial discovery call follow-up
Interaction.content: Sent product brochure and ROI calculator after discovery call. Decision timeline is 4-6 weeks. Budget approved. Primary stakeholder engaged.

Interaction.subject: Renewal discussion - 3-year contract
Interaction.content: Discussed multi-year renewal. Customer open to 3-year deal for additional discount. Sent proposal with 10% multi-year pricing.

Interaction.subject: Usage growth review
Interaction.content: Reviewed growing usage metrics. Customer team expanded. Discussed API usage limits and potential upgrade path.

Interaction.subject: Executive business review
Interaction.content: Conducted EBR with CTO and CFO. Presented ROI analysis showing 340% return. Both executives committed to renewal and expansion.
